resharedPost.text:
First Boost Turku Builder Challenge finished! Congratulations for the winner Mary Anne Selirio 🥳🤩🙌🏻 6 amazing founders-to-be crossed the finish line at todays Showroom.

”The Content of the workshops was impactful.” - Vishaka

”1-on-1 sessions were the best part.” - Samia 

”I couldn't have done it without Uruj, Uruj is the best.” - Mary

With 0€ budget and with 1 months notice Uruj Sarwar and Prashani JAYASINGHA created an impactful pilot program.

Already planning the next one and looking for funding opportunities and partners to create even more impactful Builder Challenge II to give tools and support to the next hardware/deeptech unicorn in Turku.

Thank you for our dear judges Jutta Ruusunen and Juha-Matti Santala ❤️🙏🏻

posts.text: Thanks to Boost Turku Builder Challenge organizers (Lauri Koittola and team) and especially Uruj Sarwar and Prashani JAYASINGHA for the privilege to pitch my first startup idea before very inspiring Judges - Juha-Matti Santala and Jutta Ruusunen. It was awesome meeting and learning from other participants. Re-echoing Juha's word: "let's make good things happen".

In Testars Quarter our Weekends are for Learning.🎉 Are you ready 🙋‍♀️ 

Join our community today 👉  www.testarsquarter.com

This Saturday we are hosting a Full-Stack Software Engineer from Microsoft. 

You cannot afford to miss this one! 📌 

Topic: Maximizing the Use of Azure For Testers

Date: November 2nd, 2024
Time: 11AM -12 PM
Venue: www.testarsquarter.com
Speaker: Samson Alajede
Moderator:Faith Ibitoye

See you there!

RDP developers? Join us at the 2023 Remote Desktop Protocols Interoperability Lab, March 20-22, Microsoft Redmond, WA campus. 

We are excited to invite you to this free, in-person event, the perfect opportunity to connect with the RDP community, meet the Microsoft RDP development & support teams, and test your RDP implementation. 

Register now to reserve your spot: https://lnkd.in/dEhtZaHB 
#microsoft #rdp #remotedesktop
